summary: Single Team subscriber out of market non-subscribed teams - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user is a single team subscriber
AND a game doesn't include the subscribed-to-team
AND the game is not in the subscribers viewing market
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3

steps.action:
WHEN a user is not subscribed to either team
AND a user views/focuses a scheduled/in-progress game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon displays in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the game tile header has a dark overlay over the team colors
